ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the country is located */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product of the country */,
  "trade_partners" TEXT /* A list of major trade partners */,
  "trade_agreements" TEXT /* A list of trade agreements the country is part of */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_region FOREIGN KEY ("region") REFERENCES regions ("region_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "commodities" (
  "commodity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each commodity */,
  "commodity_name" TEXT /* Name of the commodity (e.g., Wheat, Rice) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the commodity (e.g., grains, fruits) */,
  "unit_of_measure" TEXT /* Unit of measure for the commodity (e.g., tons, kilograms) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the commodity */,
  "origin" TEXT /* Primary origin of the commodity */,
  "import_tariff" REAL /* Import tariff rate for the commodity */,
  "export_tariff" REAL /* Export tariff rate for the commodity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("commodity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_values" (
  "trade_value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade value entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country involved in the trade */,
  "commodity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the commodity being traded */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the trade */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the trade in the specified year */,
  "volume" REAL /* Volume of trade in the specified unit of measure */,
  "trade_direction" TEXT /* Direction of trade (import/export) */,
  "trade_partners" TEXT /* A list of trade partners involved in the transaction */,
  "trade_agreement" TEXT /* Trade agreement under which the trade occurred */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the trade data (e.g., customs, agricultural department) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_values_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_values_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES trade_years ("year"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_values_commodity_id FOREIGN KEY ("commodity_id") REFERENCES commodities ("commodity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of trade data */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the trade year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the trade year */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the trade year (e.g., open, closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the region */,
  "climate" TEXT /* Climate type of the region */,
  "major_crops" TEXT /* List of major crops grown in the region */,
  "trade_significance" TEXT /* Trade significance of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who created the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data or summary generated in the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., annual, quarterly, monthly) */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, final) */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report's key findings */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data used in the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)
